## Evidence and Scope

- [ ] Outputs are clearly labeled as synthetic, real, pending, or public-safe.
- [ ] No data, embeddings, caches, indexes, weights, secrets, `.env` files, or private paths were committed.
- [ ] Benchmark definitions are unchanged, or the approved change is linked.
- [ ] Public claims remain consistent with `docs/CLAIMS_LADDER.md`.
- [ ] Real and synthetic results are not mixed.

## Validation

<!-- List exact commands run. -->

- [ ] Python tests pass when relevant.
- [ ] Public-copy consistency passes when relevant.
- [ ] Web lint, typecheck, tests, and build pass when relevant.
- [ ] Commit, seed, configuration, and input checksum are recorded for experiments.
